task_completion.description: CoppeliaSim is open with an empty scene initially or containing the constructed mechanism.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A script is written to programmatically construct the mechanism and perform the sweep using the ZMQ Remote API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor or terminal displays a script (likely Python) that imports the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API, defines link lengths (0.3, 0.25, 0.15), and includes logic for a kinematic sweep.

task_completion.description: The 3-DOF planar articulated manipulator is constructed in the CoppeliaSim scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim Scene Hierarchy panel shows a base-to-tip hierarchy consisting of a base, 3 revolute joints, and 3 links.

task_completion.description: The kinematic sweep results are exported to a CSV file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or editor shows the file 'kinematic_sweep.csv' located in '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/'.

task_completion.description: The kinematic model specifications are exported to a JSON file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or editor shows the file 'kinematic_model.json' located in '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/'.

integrity.description: The mechanism was built programmatically via script, not manually through the CoppeliaSim GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen writing and executing a script to build the robot. There should be no evidence of the agent manually using the CoppeliaSim 'Add' menu to insert joints and shapes.

integrity.description: The CSV and JSON files were generated by running the script, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal should show the script being executed (e.g., 'python3 script.py'). The agent should not be seen manually typing JSON or CSV data into a text editor.

integrity.description: The exported files are placed exactly in the requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths for the generated CSV and JSON must explicitly show '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the programmatic creation of a 3-DOF planar arm with link lengths exactly 0.3m, 0.25m, and 0.15m. The forward kinematics sweep must test at least 25 configurations. The outputs must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/kinematic_sweep.csv and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/kinematic_model.json.
